channel.title: Govt Website Change Alerts
channel.description: Automated change detection for monitored government websites

item.title: Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI): 2 new links, 1 new text block
item.description:
2 new links, 1 new text block
New text: TRAI releases clarifications regarding functioning of designated 1600 series and 140 series
New links:

  • Explore

item.title: Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI): 4 new links, 7 new text blocks
item.description:
4 new links, 7 new text blocks
New text: 10th July 2026 | Panel of Auditors (Updated List) to carry out audit of Digital Addressable Systems (DAS) | Consumer Outreach Programme at Leh (Ladakh) by TRAI Regional Office, Delhi | 10:30 AM | Leh, Ladakh

item.title: Ministry of Information & Broadcasting (MIB): 1 new link, 2 new text blocks
item.description:
1 new link, 2 new text blocks
New text: एनएफडीसी-एनएफएआई के अभिलेखीय संरक्षण से मलयालम क्लासिक फिल्म "किरीदम" 4के वर्जन में बड़े पर्दे पर वापस आई | 10 जुलाई 2026

item.title: Department of Telecommunications (DoT): 2 new text blocks
item.description:
2 new text blocks
New text: Appointment of Shri Ashish Kumar, ITS, Staff No 21141 as Joint Advisor in TRAI HQ on deputation basis | Voluntary Retirement from Govt Service – Smt Ayesha Siddiqui, ITS, Staff No 20777, presently PGM, Kolkata BA, WB Telecom Circle

item.title: Department of Telecommunications (DoT): 2 new text blocks
item.description:
2 new text blocks

item.title: Department of Telecommunications (DoT): 1 new text block, 2 items no longer on page
item.description:
1 new text block, 2 items no longer on page
New text: भारतीय डाक और दूरसंचार लेखा और वित्त सेवा, समूह 'ए' के कनिष्ठ प्रशासनिक ग्रेड और उससे नीचे के स्तर में स्थानांतरण/नियुक्ति

item.title: Ministry of Electronics & IT (MeitY): 2 new links, 3 new text blocks, 5 items no longer on page
item.description:
2 new links, 3 new text blocks, 5 items no longer on page
New text: इलेक्ट्रॉनिक और सूचना प्रौद्योगिकी मंत्रालय द्वारा साझा की गई एक पोस्ट (@goi_meity) | Rate this translation | Submit
New links:

  • View this post on Instagram
